# JobAlchemist

Official website: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/
Product app: https://app.jobalchemist.tech/
Contact: hello@jobalchemist.tech

## Tagline
Apply with confidence, not guesswork.

## What JobAlchemist does
JobAlchemist helps job seekers decode job ads, assess fit and gaps, and generate tailored CV and cover letter drafts.

## Who it is for
Individual job seekers who want role-specific guidance instead of generic AI outputs.

## Core capabilities
- Job ad intelligence to surface hidden requirements and context.
- CV analysis focused on strengths, gaps, and recruiter-style clarity.
- Job-fit analysis with rationale and gap identification.
- Role-specific CV and cover letter drafting.
- Job-search workflow organization across roles and versions.

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/
- Terms of Use: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/terms.html
- Privacy Policy: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/privacy.html

## Trust and policy notes
- Terms: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/terms.html
- Privacy: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/privacy.html
- AI outputs are assistive and should be reviewed by users before submission.
